name: 17p11_2_LLGL1_SD
description: Middle SMS-REP block containing LLGL1 and FLII paralogs. Sub-locus of the proximal-mid SMS-REP triad; sits between proximal and distal SMS-REPs and is involved in some atypical SMS deletion breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Single ~250 kb middle SMS-REP module composed of LLGL1, FLII, TOP3A paralogous content at >98% identity to flanking SMS-REPs.
